He also covers this week’s Japanese FX intervention and the rates outlook after key policy decisions.

title_cn: 特朗普誓言维持对伊朗的海军封锁，铝价上涨
summary: Aluminum gained, with traders seeing little prospect of an imminent opening of the Strait of Hormuz that would ease availability of the metal.

title: Lake Como Club’s Bold Business Play
title_cn: 科莫湖俱乐部的大胆商业策略
summary: A small Italian soccer club is rewriting the business of sports—turning Lake Como into a luxury global brand. Como 1907 President Mirwan Suwarso joined Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about how he's building a multi-club retail empire, targeting US fans, and scaling through partnerships. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTSE 100 Pares Losses in Thin Holiday Trading as Oil Declines
title_cn: 由于石油价格下跌，富时 100 指数在假日交易清淡期间收复损失
summary: UK shares erased most of their losses in thin holiday trading as oil declined amid hopes for a peace deal in the Iran war.

title: BP Reviews UK North Sea Assets as New CEO Eyes Disposals
title_cn: 英国石油公司审查英国北海资产，新任首席执行官着眼于出售
summary: BP Plc is considering potentially exiting part or all of its operations in the UK North Sea, people familiar with the matter said, as the oil giant works to strip assets and pay down debt.

title: Stocks Climb and Oil Falls on US-Iran Peace Hopes: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊和平希望推动股市上涨、油价下跌：市场休整
summary: A record-breaking run drove stocks toward their longest weekly rally since 2024 amid hopes for a deal to end the Iran war that has rattled financial markets and jeopardized the economic outlook.

title: Gold Rises as Iranian Proposal Raises Hopes for US-Tehran Deal
title_cn: 伊朗提案提高了美国与德黑兰达成协议的希望，金价上涨
summary: Gold rose amid hopes for a deal to end the standoff between the US and Iran that’s dashed expectations for rate cuts from central banks across the world.

title: Copper Costs Turn Negative for Southern, Vale as Gold and Silver Byproducts Soar
title_cn: 随着黄金和白银副产品飙升，南方和淡水河谷的铜成本转为负值
summary: For copper miners Southern Copper Corp. and Vale SA, surging prices of byproducts like gold and silver are creating an unusual situation: The cost of producing the red metal has turned negative.

title: Oil Falls as Traders Parse Iran’s Stance to End War
title_cn: 交易员解析伊朗结束战争的立场，油价下跌
summary: Oil edged lower in thin trading as signs emerged that Iran had delivered a new proposal to the US to end a conflict that has jolted global energy markets, leading traders to peel back risk ahead of the weekend.

title: AIG Shares Rise After Profit Jumps, Recent Deals Take Hold
title_cn: AIG 股价在利润大幅上涨后上涨，近期交易生效
summary: American International Group Inc. reported first-quarter results that exceeded Wall Street expectations, driven in part by a jump in net premiums written and lower catastrophe losses.

title: Bond Traders Eye Fresh Gilts Selloff as Local Elections Loom
title_cn: 随着地方选举临近，债券交易商关注新一轮英国国债抛售
summary: UK bond investors are shifting their focus from monetary policy to politics, with local elections next week seen as a potential catalyst for turmoil in government that could trigger a renewed selloff.

title: Shopify Analyst Who Saw Selloff Coming Says Too Soon to Buy
title_cn: 看到抛售即将到来的 Shopify 分析师表示，现在买入还为时过早
summary: The analyst who slapped the only sell rating on Shopify Inc. over valuation concerns ahead of its blistering rout said it’s still too soon to jump back in.

title: Exxon, Chevron Beat Profit Estimates on War-Driven Oil Rally
title_cn: 埃克森美孚和雪佛龙在战争驱动的石油上涨中超出了利润预期
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. and Chevron Corp. posted stronger-than-expected earnings for the first quarter as higher oil and natural gas prices outweighed production outages from the Iran war.

title: US Manufacturing Steady as Prices Paid Gauge Hits Four-Year High
title_cn: 美国制造业稳定，支付价格创四年新高
summary: The Institute for Supply Management’s gauge of prices paid for manufacturing inputs climbed for a fourth straight month to a four-year high of 84.6, according to data released Friday. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Natural Gas Futures Fall Alongside Oil Price Drop, LNG Dip
title_cn: 美国天然气期货随着油价下跌和液化天然气下跌而下跌
summary: US natural gas futures declined, reversing earlier gains, as falling oil prices triggered financial outflows from baskets of energy products that include US gas. Continued lower feedgas to the Cameron LNG terminal in Louisiana also weighed on prices.

title: Versant’s SportsEngine to Sell to Genstar’s PlayMetrics
title_cn: Versant 的 SportsEngine 将出售给 Genstar 的 PlayMetrics
summary: Versant Media Group Inc., the owner of the Golf Channel and E!, has agreed to sell the youth-sports app SportsEngine to PlayMetrics, a competitor backed by Genstar Capital, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Ares Earnings Miss Estimates Despite Record Fundraising Haul
title_cn: 尽管筹款量创纪录，但阿瑞斯的盈利仍低于预期
summary: Ares Management Corp., facing a slump in dealmaking while navigating broader market turmoil, reported first-quarter earnings that missed Wall Street estimates even as wealthy clients helped fuel a record $30 billion of fundraising during the period.

title: Miami’s Biggest Boom Ever, Says Billionaire Perez
title_cn: 亿万富翁佩雷斯表示，迈阿密有史以来最大的繁荣
summary: Jorge Perez, the billionaire founder of Related Group and a defining force behind Miami's real estate boom, sat down with Matt Miller at Bloomberg House Miami for a wide-ranging conversation. He discussed the city’s unprecedented growth, the influx of capital and talent reshaping South Florida, and the policy and business dynamics driving Miami’s emergence as a global hub. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Relays New Proposal to US as Naval Blockade Stands
title_cn: 由于海上封锁，伊朗向美国转达新提案
summary: Iran delivered a new proposal to the US via Pakistan and President Donald Trump vowed to maintain a naval blockade, with the fate of the Strait of Hormuz remaining at the heart of the stalemate. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank-Tied Deal Raises Nearly $1 Billion for US Data Centers
title_cn: 软银联合交易为美国数据中心筹集近 10 亿美元资金
summary: A data-center developer sold $999 million of junk bonds for a project leased to a SoftBank Group Corp. subsidiary, capping April’s surge of debt issuance to help fund artificial intelligence efforts amid some concerns that such spending won’t pay off.

title: SEC Semiannual Reporting Proposal Clears White House Review
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会半年度报告提案通过白宫审查
summary: A Securities and Exchange Commission plan to let public companies cut quarterly disclosures to twice a year moved closer to reality after passing a White House review.

title: Higher Oil Prices Won't Spur US Recession, Strategist Amoroso Says
title_cn: 策略师阿莫罗索表示，油价上涨不会刺激美国经济衰退
summary: Anastasia Amoroso, Partners Group Private Wealth chief investment strategist, says higher oil prices are manageable for now. Speaking on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Amoroso says US energy independence prevents physical shortages that have affected regions like China and parts of Europe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Grain Flows Slump as US Blockade Cuts Access to Key Port
title_cn: 由于美国封锁限制了主要港口的进入，伊朗粮食流量锐减
summary: Crop shipments to Iran through the Strait of Hormuz have fallen more than 40% from March, with a prolonged US blockade threatening to worsen the country’s already high food inflation.

title: Colombia Central Bank Shocks Traders and Fuels Steepener Bets
title_cn: 哥伦比亚央行震惊交易员并加剧押注
summary: An unexpected pause in Colombia’s interest-rate hikes is threatening to upend local markets, with skepticism over the central bank’s credibility building weeks before a pivotal presidential election.

title: Wall Street Is Bullish on Oracle, But Investors Aren’t Buying It
title_cn: 华尔街看好甲骨文，但投资者并不买账
summary: To Wall Street, Oracle Corp. is a screaming buy. To many investors, however, the company’s relationship with OpenAI, its sizable debt load and the durability of its software business have made owning the stock a risk.

title: Emerging Assets Extend Gains as Iran Delivers New Proposal to US
title_cn: 伊朗向美国提交新提案，新兴资产扩大涨幅
summary: Emerging-market benchmarks for stocks and currencies extended climb in holiday-thinned trade as Iran delivered a new proposal to the US via Pakistan while the Strait of Hormuz remains shut.

title: Moderna CEO on Earnings, Flu Shots and Skin Cancer Trials
title_cn: Moderna 首席执行官谈收益、流感疫苗和皮肤癌试验
summary: Moderna’s first-quarter sales beat expectations, as the struggling vaccine maker that’s faced resistance from the Trump administration has found new growth outside the US. Moderna CEO Stephane Bancel sits down with Bloomberg's Katie Greifeld, saying the company's skin cancer trial results should arrive this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Billionaire’s Family Office Plots More Private Equity Exits
title_cn: 亿万富翁的家族办公室计划更多私募股权退出
summary: The billionaire UK founder of a home-repair business acquired by Brookfield Asset Management is working to ramp up his family office’s private equity exits, as larger buyout firms grapple with a dry spell for transactions.

title: Exxon CEO Says Price Caps, Export Bans Will Worsen Energy Woes
title_cn: 埃克森美孚首席执行官表示价格上限和出口禁令将加剧能源困境
summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. Chief Executive Officer Darren Woods warned that national bans on exporting fuel hurt the global market and restrict needed supplies.

title: Yen Traders on Alert After Japan’s $34.5 Billion Intervention
title_cn: 日本 345 亿美元干预后日元交易者保持警惕
summary: Yen traders are on watch for signs of further action by Japanese authorities after intervention triggered the currency’s sharpest rally in three years on Thursday.

title: How Iran War Is Changing Global Supply Chains
title_cn: 伊朗战争如何改变全球供应链
summary: Shahmir Khaliq, head of services at Citi, examines how the shifts in global supply chains from the Iran war are forcing businesses to change how they think about production and input costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Economy 'Incredibly Resilient': Mossavar-Rahmani
title_cn: 莫萨瓦尔-拉赫马尼：美国经济“极其有弹性”
summary: Sharmin Mossavar-Rahmani, wealth management CIO and head of the investment strategy group at Goldman Sachs, says the US economy has been "incredibly resilient" despite the impact of the Iran war. She joined "Bloomberg Surveillance" on April 30 to discuss how significant AI spending by Big Tech and restrictive monetary policies are shaping market dynamics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia, Microsoft, Amazon Expand Classified Military AI Use
title_cn: 英伟达、微软、亚马逊扩大机密军事人工智能用途
summary: The Pentagon has struck agreements with four more technology companies for expanded use of advanced artificial intelligence tools on classified military networks, according to a Defense Department statement and two defense officials briefed on the matter.

title: Tether’s Gold Hoard Nears $20 Billion as Buying Continues
title_cn: 随着购买的继续，Tether 的黄金储备接近 200 亿美元
summary: Tether Holdings SA bought more than six tons of gold for its reserves in the first three months of the year, extending a buying streak that’s made it the largest known holder of bullion in the world outside of banks and nation states.

title: What’s Tech’s Next iPhone Moment?
title_cn: iPhone 的下一个科技时刻是什么？
summary:
Will OpenAI ever bring a smartphone, or some other smartphone-like device, to market?

On this episode of the Everybody's Business podcast, we are joined by Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman, the author of the Power On newsletter and managing editor for consumer technology. He tells Stacey Vanek Smith and Max Chafkin whether such a device could succeed and what the next iPhone moment might look like. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Forecast Tops Estimates Even as Mac Shortages Linger
title_cn: 尽管 Mac 短缺问题依然存在，但苹果的预测仍高于预期
summary: Apple Inc. delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, even as it warned that memory-chip costs will increase and that shortages of Mac computers will persist for “several months.”

title: Roblox Shares Fall Most in Four Years on Slowing User Growth
title_cn: 由于用户增长放缓，Roblox 股价出现四年来最大跌幅
summary: Roblox Corp. shares plunged the most in more than four years on Friday after the video game company reported fewer daily users in the first quarter than analysts expected, due to safety features it implemented to restrict how kids can use the platform.

title: OpenAI CFO Cites ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官引用产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI Chief Financial Officer Sarah Friar sees “a vertical wall of demand” for the company’s products as she pushed back Thursday on concerns about missing internal targets in a Bloomberg interview. Ed Ludlow reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Caterpillar’s Biggest Bear Folds as AI Power Demand Soars
title_cn: 随着人工智能电力需求飙升，卡特彼勒最大的熊市倒闭
summary: Caterpillar Inc.’s biggest Wall Street bear has thrown in the towel after watching the stock more than double on the back of surging demand for the company’s power generation equipment.

title: US Stocks Extend Record Gains, Oil Falls on Iran Talks Report
title_cn: 美国股市延续创纪录涨幅，伊朗谈判报告导致油价下跌
summary: The S&P 500 Index extended record-breaking gains Friday as tech megacaps delivered a stream of solid earnings. Reports that Iran had responded to US amendments on an agreement to end the war also buoyed sentiment, sending oil prices lower.

title: Artemis II Is Just the Opening Act for NASA, Isaacman Says
title_cn: 艾萨克曼表示，阿尔忒弥斯二号只是美国宇航局的开幕表演
summary: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman discusses the future of US space travel and the Trump administration’s plans for the moon, Mars, and beyond. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dan Ives Sees Apple ‘Golden Age’ as It Monetizes Consumer AI
title_cn: 丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 认为苹果公司通过消费者人工智能货币化的“黄金时代”
summary: “The consumer AI revolution is gonna go through Cupertino,” says Dan Ives, global head of tech research and senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, as he discusses expectations for Apple’s AI strategy after the company delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank-Backed Opay Hires Citi, Deutsche, JPMorgan for US IPO
title_cn: 软银支持的 Opay 聘请花旗、德意志银行、摩根大通参与美国 IPO
summary: Opay Digital Services Ltd. is working with Citigroup Inc., Deutsche Bank AG, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. as the Nigeria-focused payments platform prepares for an initial public offering, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Nebius Agrees to Buy Startup That Makes AI Run Faster, Cheaper
title_cn: Nebius 同意收购让人工智能运行更快、更便宜的初创公司
summary: The cloud provider’s deal for Eigen AI will help the inference business

title: Economic Crosscurrents Mount as Energy Shock Meets AI Wave
title_cn: 能源冲击与人工智能浪潮相遇，经济逆流加剧
summary: The global economy is increasingly captive to two opposing forces.

title: ‘Golden’ or ‘Garbage’: Milken Signals New Era for Private Credit
title_cn: “黄金”还是“垃圾”：米尔肯标志着私人信贷的新时代
summary: Months before Jamie Dimon’s infamous remark about more than one “cockroach” lurking in credit markets, TCW Group Inc. Chief Executive Officer Katie Koch warned the direct lending industry was due for a reckoning.

title: Meta’s AI Spending Overshadows Addiction Lawsuits, Youth Bans
title_cn: Meta 的人工智能支出掩盖了成瘾诉讼和青少年禁令
summary: Social media companies face backlash over safety of youth on their platforms

title: S&P Set for Best Month Since 2020, Apple Beats Earnings | The Close 4/30/2026
title_cn: 标准普尔创下 2020 年以来最佳月份业绩，苹果公司业绩好于预期收盘价 2026 年 4 月 30 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Man Group’s Matt Rowe, Investment Company Institute’s Eric Pan, Needham’s Laura Martin, Netomi CEO Puneet Mehta & WndrCo’s Jeffrey Katzenberg, Former Minneapolis Fed President Gary Stern, Kayne Anderson Rudnick’s Julie Biel, Thornburg’s Christian Hoffmann, Seaport Research Partners’ Jay Goldberg, Christian & Timbers CEO Jeff Christian, IDC’s Nabila Popal, & BMO’s Kristin Milchanowski. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Acquires Rival FlyTaxi in Hong Kong Push, Sing Tao Reports
title_cn: 据《星岛日报》报道，Uber 在香港收购了竞争对手 FlyTaxi
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has agreed to acquire Hong Kong’s FlyTaxi as part of its expansion plans in the city, Sing Tao Daily reported, citing an announcement by the US-based company.

title: AI Agents Are Becoming Day Traders, But Gains Are Elusive
title_cn: 人工智能代理正在成为日内交易者，但收益难以捉摸
summary: Jake Nesler’s AI trading bot got one big decision right in its first week. It ignored the chase.

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI Chief Financial Officer Sarah Friar pushed back on concerns about missing internal targets, saying the company is meeting objectives and sees “a vertical wall of demand” for its products.

title: Apple Sales Forecast Beats Estimates
title_cn: 苹果销售预测好于预期
summary: Apple delivered a strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, with sales expected to rise 14% to 17% in the period. The company warned that memory-chip costs will increase and that shortages of Mac computers will persist for "several months." Bloomberg Intelligence's Matthew Bloxham breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Toto Shares Surge on Plans to Boost Chip Parts Business
title_cn: Toto 计划推动芯片零部件业务，股价飙升
summary: Toto Ltd. shares soared as much as 18%, the most on record, in Tokyo after the toilet maker said it plans to ramp up investment in its chip components business due to strong AI demand.

title: Apple Delivers Strong Forecast in Sign It’s Weathering Shortages
title_cn: 苹果公司发布强劲预测，表明其正在经受短缺的考验
summary: Apple delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, benefiting from new products launched in March, including the MacBook Neo and updated iPad Air. Ed Ludlow has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Key Takeaways From Apple's Q2 Earnings Beat
title_cn: 苹果第二季度盈利的主要要点
summary: Apple delivered second-quarter revenue that edged past analysts’ estimates, helped by demand for the iPhone and Mac. Ed Ludlow reacts to the earnings report on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Debt Investors Show Fatigue After $300 Billion Binge
title_cn: AI 债务投资者在 3000 亿美元的狂欢之后表现出疲劳
summary: After a $300 billion AI debt binge that spanned every corner of the credit market, investors are starting to show some signs of fatigue.

title: Apple Tops Sales Estimates After iPhone, Mac Help Fuel Growth
title_cn: iPhone、Mac 推动增长后，苹果销量突破预期
summary:
Apple Inc. reported revenue for the fiscal second quarter that topped analysts’ estimates, helped by demand for the iPhone and Mac. 
Revenue jumped 17% to $111.2 billion during the period, which ended March 28, the company said in a statement Thursday. Analysts had expected $109.7 billion. Apple itself had projected sales growth of 13% to 16%. Bloomberg's Anurag Rana and Ed Ludlow join to break it down. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anger and Fear Overwhelms London’s Golders Green After Antisemitic Attack
title_cn: 反犹太主义袭击后，愤怒和恐惧淹没了伦敦的戈尔德斯绿地
summary: Abraham was studying in a synagogue in Golders Green, north London, on Wednesday morning when someone rushed in with a warning: lock the doors, an attacker is on the rampage. Just outside, two Jewish men had been stabbed. Police surrounded the assailant, and arrested him on suspicion of attempted murder. For the 40–year-old Israeli, a visit to friends became a reminder of how quickly a sense of normality can shatter, even far from home.

title: US Sanctions Congo Ex-President Joseph Kabila for Rebel Ties
title_cn: 美国因与叛军关系而制裁刚果前总统约瑟夫·卡比拉
summary: The US sanctioned Joseph Kabila, the former president of the Democratic Republic of Congo, for his ties to a rebel group occupying a large part of the country’s mineral-rich east.

title: Iran Delivers New Proposal to US as Hormuz Remains Shut
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡仍处于关闭状态，伊朗向美国提交新提案
summary: Iran delivered a new proposal to the US and President Donald Trump vowed to maintain a naval blockade, as the two sides pursue behind-the-scenes diplomacy to turn a fragile ceasefire into a lasting peace.

title: Brazil’s Bolsonaro Admitted to Hospital for Shoulder Surgery
title_cn: 巴西总统博尔索纳罗因肩部手术入院
summary: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was hospitalized in Brasilia on Friday morning to undergo surgery on his right shoulder, his wife Michelle Bolsonaro said in a post on Instagram.

title: Lula Unveils Debt Relief Program Ahead of Elections
title_cn: 卢拉在选举前推出债务减免计划
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva on Thursday announced a program to renegotiate household debt, his latest measure to support consumption as he seeks to bolster his popularity ahead of Brazil’s October election.

title: Trump’s US Tariffs Turn UK Trade Surpluses Into Deficits
title_cn: 特朗普的美国关税将英国贸易顺差变成赤字
summary: President Donald Trump’s tariffs have resulted in a sharp fall in UK exports to the US, turning British trade surpluses into deficits in a dramatic reversal of transatlantic trade dynamics, according to official data.

title: GOP Steers Clear on Iran as War Hits Key 60-Day Milestone
title_cn: 随着战争达到 60 天的关键里程碑，共和党不再关注伊朗问题
summary: Trump is looking to buy more time to reach a deal, and most Republicans are glad to give it.

title: American Farmers Shun USDA Surveys as Trust in Data Erodes
title_cn: 美国农民回避美国农业部调查，因为对数据的信任受到侵蚀
summary: American farmers are ignoring US Department of Agriculture surveys in the latest sign of distrust in government data.

title: New York’s Ultra-Rich Defend Citadel’s Griffin As Penthouse Dig Turns Personal
title_cn: 纽约超级富豪捍卫 Citadel 的格里芬，顶层公寓挖掘变成私人
summary: The press release from Zohran Mamdani declaring New York City’s first pied-à-terre tax cited a $238 million penthouse in Midtown bought by one Ken Griffith.

title: The US States Where Gas Prices Are Surging Fastest Under Trump
title_cn: 特朗普治下美国天然气价格上涨最快的州
summary:
US President Donald Trump has vowed to maintain a naval blockade on Iran, reiterating that the policy is depriving the Islamic Republic of much-needed oil revenue. West Texas Intermediate, the main US crude marker, rallied toward $111 a barrel on Thursday, while Brent, the global benchmark, topped $126.

Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei cast doubt on the prospects of a deal, vowing not to give up the Islamic Republic’s nuclear or missile technologies, and signaling Tehran would keep control of the Strait of Hormuz.

The American Automobile Association says in California, the average statewide price for regular gasoline rose to $6.01, the highest since October 2023. Skyrocketing pump prices are a major political risk for President Donald Trump’s White House, especially ahead of the midterm elections.

Bloomberg's Charlie Wells explains on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Corruption Scandals Are Plaguing Argentina’s Milei
title_cn: 腐败丑闻困扰着阿根廷米莱
summary: The libertarian president is stretching the boundaries of what voters will take.

title: How the Strait of Hormuz Has Become a Weapon of War
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡如何成为战争武器
summary: No region of the world produces more oil and gas than the countries straddling the Persian Gulf, and most of it needs to travel by tanker via the Strait of Hormuz.

title: How Taiwan Became the World's Most Perilous Geopolitical Chokepoint
title_cn: 台湾如何成为世界上最危险的地缘政治咽喉要地
summary: Eyck Freymann on the biggest flashpoint of them all.

title: Odd Lots: How Taiwan Could Become a Global Chokepoint (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：台湾如何成为全球的咽喉要道（播客）
summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has highlighted the potential for long-running theoretical chokepoints to turn into reality, with dramatic results for both geopolitics and the global economy. But the hypothetical scenario that policymakers have arguably been losing the most sleep over for decades is the prospect of a major conflict between China and Taiwan. So how likely is it, and what would such a conflict actually look like? On this episode, we speak with Eyck Freymann, author of the new

title: Oil Holds Weekly Gain as Trump Sticks With Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普坚持封锁，油价保持每周上涨
summary: Oil held its second weekly gain as US President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports. Oil has soared more than a quarter over the past two weeks as the deadlock in negotiations extends the near-total closure of the crucial waterway, which before the war carried about a fifth of the world’s crude. Bloomberg’s Anthony di Paola reports.

title: Trump Sticks With Blockade, Says It’s ‘Incredible’
title_cn: 特朗普坚持封锁，称这“令人难以置信”
summary: US President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports as concerns the vital Strait of Hormuz would not reopen anytime soon continue. “The blockade is incredible,” Trump told reporters at the White House. Bloomberg’s Stuart Livingstone-Wallace reports.

title: Why ‘India Has Lost Its Way’
title_cn: 为什么“印度迷失了方向”
summary: Author Amitav Ghosh has built a global following with novels that draw on historical research. His latest is Ghost-Eye, and it’s deeply personal, as he discusses with Mishal Husain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spain’s Booming Economy Fails to Help Its Poorest Children
title_cn: 西班牙蓬勃发展的经济未能帮助最贫困的儿童
summary: The country’s child poverty rate is one of the highest in Europe — and it’s barely changed in 20 years. Will an ambitious bet on universal childcare make a difference?

title: El auge económico de España no ayuda a sus niños más pobres
title_cn: 西班牙的经济繁荣并没有帮助最贫困的儿童
summary: España quiere invertir miles de millones para combatir la pobreza infantil y la exclusión social

title: Trump Says Iran Blockade ‘Incredible’ as Pump Prices Keep Rising
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗封锁“令人难以置信”，因为汽油价格不断上涨
summary: President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports amid concerns the vital Strait of Hormuz would not reopen anytime soon.

title: Trump Signs Bill Ending DHS Shutdown | Balance of Power: Late Edition 04/30/2026
title_cn: 特朗普签署结束国土安全部关闭的法案权力平衡：最新版 04/30/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Leon Panetta, former US Defense Secretary and former CIA Director, criticizes Secretary Hegseth's political tone in congressional testimony, arguing lawmakers have a duty to scrutinize defense spending. Kevin Book, Managing Director at ClearView Energy Partners, says oil markets are reacting to "uncertainty" tied to both White House policy and tensions in the Persian Gulf. Chris Swonger, President and CEO of the Distilled Spirits Council & Responsibility.org, says President Donald Trump’s pledge to remove a 10% tariff on UK spirits would “inject vitality” into the industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Greer Discusses ‘Board of Trade’ in Call With China’s He Lifeng
title_cn: 格里尔与中国何立峰通话讨论“贸易委员会”
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said American officials discussed a possible “Board of Trade” in a call with Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng Thursday, casting it as a tool that could help manage economic ties between the two nations.

title: Trump Signs Permit for Oil Pipeline Echoing Keystone XL
title_cn: 特朗普签署石油管道许可证，呼应 Keystone XL
summary: US President Donald Trump on Thursday signed a presidential permit authorizing the Bridger Pipeline expansion project meant to carry Canadian crude to Wyoming — the latest in years of back-and-forth over oil pipelines linking the countries.

title: Trump Nominates Saphier for Surgeon General, Pulls Means
title_cn: 特朗普提名萨菲尔为卫生局局长，并采取措施
summary: President Donald Trump pulled the nomination of wellness entrepreneur Casey Means to be US surgeon general and named Nicole Saphier, a radiologist, to replace her.

title: Tariff Cut Would Boost US-UK Whiskey Trade: Swonger
title_cn: Swonger：关税削减将促进美英威士忌贸易
summary: Chris Swonger, President and CEO of the Distilled Spirits Council and President and CEO of Responsibility.org, says President Donald Trump’s pledge to remove a 10% tariff on UK spirits would “inject vitality” into the industry, boosting trade and giving producers greater predictability between two “uniquely intertwined” whiskey markets. The President's announcement came following King Charles’s visit to the US, though the tariff rollback has not yet been implemented. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Order Pushes Fixed-Price Contracts in Federal Agencies
title_cn: 特朗普命令在联邦机构推行固定价格合同
summary: President Donald Trump ordered federal agencies to make fixed-price agreements the default vehicle for government purchasing, shifting away from cost-reimbursement contracts that he said can lead to runaway spending.

title: Expert: Gasoline Could Rise Another 20-30 Cents
title_cn: 专家：汽油可能再涨20-30美分
summary: Kevin Book, Managing Director at ClearView Energy Partners, says oil markets are reacting to "uncertainty" tied to both White House policy and tensions in the Persian Gulf, as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz pushes crude into triple digits. He warns gasoline prices could rise another 20 to 30 cents and says shortages are already emerging in cooking fuels for Asian importers, with global shortfalls possible within weeks to months. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: More Bombing Won't Move Iran: Panetta
title_cn: 帕内塔：更多轰炸不会让伊朗动摇
summary: Leon Panetta, former US Defense Secretary and former CIA Director, criticizes Secretary Hegseth's political tone in congressional testimony, arguing lawmakers have a duty to scrutinize defense spending. He warns the standoff in the Strait of Hormuz is damaging both the Iranian and US economies—driving up oil, food and fertilizer prices. Asked whether additional strikes would move the needle, Panetta says negotiations are "the only way" the conflict will ultimately end. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Tempers Hopes of US Reset Despite King’s Royal Charm-Fest
title_cn: 尽管有国王的皇家魅力盛宴，英国还是缓和了美国重启的希望
summary: King Charles III left Washington with the same goodwill from Donald Trump that greeted him when he arrived three days earlier as the president hailed him as “the greatest king,” adding “we need more people like that in our country.”
